evmasm_development.highlight: EVMASM: EVM written in RISC-V assembly using Lean4 formal verification
24 of 55 RISC-V opcodes formally verified against SAIL spec

execution_witness_updates.highlight: New Engine API: enginePayloadWithWitness combines payload and witness generation
139 execution witness tests released; Erigon passing current suite
Witness generation 20x faster via HTTP+SSZ vs JSON-RPC+JSON

guest_program_progress.highlight: Guest program spec finalized with 25 invalid witness rejection tests
libSSZ library provides 2x speedup; all guest dependencies now no-std
ZISC cost reduced 2x via GPU DMA and memcopy optimizations

zkvm_standards.highlight: 5 standards accepted: RISC-V target, I/O interface, crypto accelerators, termination, memory
Proposed: minimum memory resources standard for stack/heap guarantees
Proposed: guard regions for null pointer and stack overflow detection

consensus_devnet.highlight: GPU-backed proof DevNet deployed end-to-end with single-command setup
Target: Lighthouse-Prysm interop DevNet by end of next week
New P2P messages: execution-proof-status and execution-proofs-by-range

proving_infrastructure.highlight: ZISC upgraded to 0.16.1 with performance improvements
OpenTelemetry integrated in AIRey and ZKBoost for trace monitoring

security_testing.highlight: ACT4 RISC-V compliance testing found multiple bugs across ZKVMs
Compliance testing now includes proving and verification, not just execution
OpenVM ProverSpec extracted with 50% less effort than ZISC version

action_items.action: Review Alex Hicks' SAIL PR for unaligned access extension coverage
Review repricing methodology adapted from Glamsterdam analysis pipeline
Review and provide feedback on memory resources and guard region proposals

targets.target: End of next week - Lighthouse-Prysm interop DevNet launch
